Keep it focused. One change per PR. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the bar.
-->

## What and why

<!-- What does this change do, and why is it needed? The diff shows the what;
     use this space for the why and the approach you chose. -->

## How you tested it

<!-- What did you actually run? Paste the commands / the test you added. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] One focused change (unrelated fixes go in their own PR).
- [ ] Added or updated tests; they fail without this change and pass with it.
- [ ] `npm test` is green locally.
- [ ] Plain ASCII, no emoji; Conventional Commits title.
- [ ] I have read this diff myself and can explain every line.
